title: Through the forest
question: 把今天课文里的“动作链写作法”和现实安全选择放进公园场景：有人抢包逃跑时，你不追，而是呼救、找保安，并描述发生了什么。用 word bank 补完整 5 个空。
example_answer: Two people rushed up to a woman and tried to steal her bag. The strap broke, and they ran through the trees. I was so surprised that I shouted for help. I did not run after them. I told a security guard which way they ran.

options.label: A
options.scenario_zh: 用 rushed up to 描述突然冲到某人跟前：两个人冲到一位女士跟前
options.english_template: Two people ___ a woman and tried to steal her bag.

options.label: B
options.scenario_zh: 用 ran through 描述逃跑路线：他们穿过树林跑
options.english_template: The strap broke, and they ___ the trees.

options.label: C
options.scenario_zh: 用 so...that 描述强烈反应导致动作：我太惊讶了，于是呼救
options.english_template: I was ___ I shouted for help.

options.label: D
options.scenario_zh: 表达现实安全选择：我没有追他们

options.label: E
options.scenario_zh: 表达安全报告：我告诉保安他们往哪个方向跑了
options.english_template: I told a security guard ___ they ran.
